polygon.style: stroke: rgb(39,87,235); stroke-width: 8; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: rgb(39,87,235); fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;

path.style: stroke: rgb(39,87,235); stroke-width: 8; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: rgb(39,87,235); fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1;

text.style: stroke: none; stroke-width: 1; stroke-dasharray: none; stroke-linecap: butt; stroke-dashoffset: 0; stroke-linejoin: miter; stroke-miterlimit: 4; fill: rgb(255,255,255); fill-rule: nonzero; opacity: 1; white-space: pre;

tspan.style: stroke-width: 1; font-family: 'Open Sans', sans-serif; font-style: normal; font-weight: normal;
